 {"id":"bd-3if6","title":"Implement wish middleware pattern (logging, recover, ratelimit)","description":"Implement Wish middleware pattern (logging, recover, ratelimit) matching Go wish.

Scope:
- Define middleware trait/type in crates/wish to compose handlers.
- Implement standard middleware: logging, recover/panic handling, rate limiting.
- Ensure middleware order and error propagation match Go semantics.
- Add unit tests and integration tests using wish examples.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Middleware API supports chaining and is used by default server builder.
- Logging/recover/ratelimit middleware behave as expected with tests.
- Integration test demonstrates middleware in a sample server.","notes":"Files: crates/wish/src/lib.rs (or middleware module), crates/wish/examples/*. Use legacy_wish for reference.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:28.687094198Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-26T01:47:14.493720286Z","closed_at":"2026-01-26T01:47:14.493694748Z","close_reason":"Middleware pattern already fully implemented: logging, recover, ratelimiter, accesscontrol, activeterm, elapsed, comment - all matching Go wish","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3o6n","title":"QA and Stabilization Session: wish, lipgloss, glamour, huh","description":"Completed a deep dive review and fix cycle for the codebase.

Fixed:
- wish: Output flushing, bubbletea integration, input handling.
- lipgloss: Theme initialization bugs, missing error types.
- glamour: Table rendering (replaced naive implementation with table.rs), updated tests.
- huh: Doc examples, missing helper methods for value extraction.
- charmed_log: Date math (migrated to chrono).

Verified:
- All crates compile cleanly.
- Tests pass for all modified crates.
- Workspace check passes.

Closed related epics/tasks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T23:46:22.301048189Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T23:46:29.525183754Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T23:46:29.525106669Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

-{"id":"bd-5hs1","title":"Wish: fix 28 unused_async clippy warnings in tests","description":"The wish/tests/e2e/ test files have 28 clippy::unused_async warnings that prevent cargo clippy --workspace -D warnings from passing cleanly.

Scope:
- Review each async function in crates/wish/tests/e2e/ and tests/common/mod.rs
- Either add await points where appropriate or remove async keyword
- Ensure tests still pass after changes
- Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings to verify fix","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T16:43:23.590032477Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T16:43:35.847789481Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-5hs1","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T16:43:23.596927485Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
